title: Circle of Allies
attention: This circle of allies is not intended for referral of "kin" or "apprentices under thy direct tutelage." Please read {faqLink} before proceeding.

earnDescription: By affixing a portal to the InterServer keep upon thy web weaving, thou shalt receive {amount} in gold tribute for each new patron conjured through thy portal.
shareUrl: Share thy unique circle portal with fellow mages

status.title: Aura
status.defaultDesc: Patron is registered under a circle ally but hath not yet fulfilled the requirements.
status.pendingDesc: Patron hath met time and tribute requirements, and awaits the council's verification.
status.failedDesc: Patron did not meet requirements or ally violated the covenant in obtaining the patron.
status.lockedDesc: Patron's grimoire is sealed and no longer viable.
status.rejectedDesc: Grimoire hath permanently failed to meet the requirements.
status.paidDesc: Circle ally hath already been paid in gold for this patron's enrollment.

faqPage.title: Frequently Sought Wisdom
faqPage.a1: We pay 100 gold flat tribute per sale, and this is one of the most generous circle programs in all the realms.
faqPage.q2: 2. How long doth it take for a sale to appear in my grimoire?
faqPage.q3: 3. I just made a sale. Where can I behold it?
faqPage.a3_step2: On the lower right side thou shalt see an option to View Circle of Allies Page.
faqPage.a3_step3: Here thou canst behold all thy brewing and approved tributes.
faqPage.q4: 4. I know a mage who needs web weaving. How do I earn a referral tribute?
faqPage.a4_step2: Scroll down to the bottom to behold thy circle portal.
faqPage.a4_step3: Dispatch this portal to thy acquaintance who needs web weaving.
faqPage.a4_step4: When they traverse that portal and conjure a grimoire with us, thou earnest tribute.
faqPage.q5: 5. I've been accepted into the InterServer Hosting Circle of Allies. What do I do now?
faqPage.a5_step1: Enter thy circle grimoire to access InterServer arcane materials by clicking the Banners and Portals tab.
faqPage.a5_step2: Choose the arcane material thou wouldst affix to thy site.
faqPage.a5_step3: Thou shalt see banner inscriptions on the right side of all banners; copy and paste this inscription to thy site.
faqPage.a5_step4: When a mage traverses that portal and conjures a web weaving grimoire, thou earnest tribute.
faqPage.q6: 6. May I use enchanted bids to promote InterServer Hosting?
faqPage.a6_line1: Aye, but prithee bid not upon our guild name, variations of our guild name, misspellings, or any keyword containing a portion thereof including InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Focus thy bids upon keywords such as swift web weaving, PHP hosting, WordPress hosting.
faqPage.a6_line3: Consult us if thou requirest aid in conjuring keywords.
faqPage.a6_line4: Ensure thou dost mark InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting as negative campaign runes.
faqPage.q7: 7. I've made a sale. Now when do I receive my gold?
faqPage.a7_line1: After 90 moon cycles a valid sale shall change from aura Default to Brewing.
faqPage.a7_line2: Once the sale is Brewing it shall be paid in gold during the first 7 days of the moon cycle.
faqPage.q8: 8. I have a brewing sale that received no gold.
faqPage.a8_line1: There may be a few reasons for this. Sometimes the council needs more time to validate a sale.
faqPage.a8_line2: One simple thing to check is to ensure thy tribute method is inscribed.
faqPage.q9: 9. How long do my sales/tributes remain brewing until they are approved?
faqPage.q10: 10. May I use my circle portal for self-referrals on grimoires I shall use for personal use?
faqPage.a10: Nay. Any contact with a resold grimoire shall result in automatic failure of the sale.
faqPage.a11_intro: Banished means the tribute has failed permanently.
faqPage.a11_reasons: Some reasons for this could be:
faqPage.a11_reason1: The patron has already enrolled with us in the past.
faqPage.a11_reason2: The same payment rune was used as another grimoire.
faqPage.a11_reason3: The arcane system detected that thou, the ally, art also using the patron's grimoire.
faqPage.a11_policy: Since our payout of 100 gold per sale is often far more than we recover from the patron even after 1 year, we have a strict covenant to catch referrals that do not meet our guidelines. If thou art referring a friend or a patron, simply give them a portal or a coupon. Share not payment runes and use not the grimoire.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Also prithee review our circle covenant articles here:
faqPage.q12: 12. I am a runecrafter/artificer and shall refer patrons. Is that acceptable?
faqPage.a12_line1: This scheme shall not work with us (or any other web weaving circle program). Once matches are found across multiple grimoires, the tributes fail.
faqPage.a12_line2: This is done to prevent the same mage from enrolling and profiting from our circle program by referring themselves.
faqPage.a12_line3: Thou mightest consider hosting the patrons directly and billing them thyself using something like the PayPal Rune. Thou canst conjure a reseller web weaving grimoire from us and begin.
faqPage.q13: 13. Where can I inscribe my tribute?
